seo.title: About Us | Vigil Care Staffing Agency London
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing is a trusted care staffing agency supplying Healthcare Assistants, Support Workers, and Cleaners to care homes and supported living across London.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: About Us
fields.sub: As a leading Care Staffing Specialist led by former nurses and care managers, we personally vet every professional we place within the NHS and private care homes.

fields.heading: Who We Are
fields.body: We don't just fill shifts, we bridge the gap between high-calibre professionals and the facilities that need them. We personally vet every Healthcare Assistant, Support Worker, and Infection Control Specialist to ensure a perfect fit for your specific care environment.

items.title: High-calibre professionals
items.body: High-calibre professionals trained by Skills for Care

items.title: Specialized training
items.body: Specialized training in dementia and mental health

items.title: All staff DBS-checked
items.body: All staff DBS-checked, trained, and ready to work

items.title: Flexible solutions
items.body: Flexible solutions for care homes, supported living, and domiciliary care

items.a: Vigil Care Staffing is a trusted care staffing agency that supplies trained Healthcare Assistants (HCAs), Support Workers, and Cleaners to care homes, nursing homes, and supported living services across London

items.q: What makes your care staffing agency different from others?
items.a: We focus on quality, compliance, and reliability. All staff are fully DBS-checked, trained, and selected based on both skill and compassion. We also offer 24/7 support and same-day cover where required.

items.q: Do you cover all areas in London?
items.a: Yes, our care staffing agency provides services throughout the capital, with strong coverage in East London, North London, South West and Central London. We also offer remote recruitment and onboarding for wider regions.

items.q: How does Vigil Care Staffing ensure staff are compliant and well-trained?
items.a: We follow strict recruitment and compliance protocols. All candidates complete mandatory training, background checks, and skills verification before placement. Our care staffing agency ensures every professional is ready to deliver safe, person-centred care.

items.q: Can I speak directly to someone about my staffing needs?
items.a: Absolutely! We have a responsive team ready to assist you. You can reach our care staffing agency via phone, email, or our online contact form. We're here to help you find the right staff quickly and efficiently.

fields.body: When you need a care staffing agency London can rely on, our expertise ensures your facility remains “Safe” and “Well-led. ” Partnering with Skills for Care , we go beyond standard CQC compliance—delivering solutions from East to South London that always put people first.

Founded as a dedicated care staffing agency London specialist, our team is led by former nurses and care managers who understand the front-line needs of the NHS and private care homes. The Bridge Our Expertise: We don’t just fill shifts, we bridge the gap between high-calibre professionals and the facilities that need them.
The Mission Our Standards: Partnering with Skills for Care, we go beyond standard CQC compliance.

Essex: Long-term placements for learning disability services. Our experienced team understands your workforce challenges and provides flexible solutions for care homes, supported living, and domiciliary care.

CQC-Compliant & Focused Compliance-Ready: Rigorous vetting ensures all staff meet "Safe" and "Well-led" standards. Audit-Proof: We handle the documentation so your facility stays fully CQC-compliant. Vetted & Ready To Work Fully DBS-Checked: All staff undergo enhanced background checks and reference verification. Mandatory Training: Every professional is pre-trained and ready to hit the ground running.

24/7 Rapid Support Same-Day Cover: Emergency staffing solutions available when you need them most. Always Online: 24/7 support to manage your shift gaps, long-term or temporary. (FAQs) Frequently Asked Question (FAQs) What is Vigil Care Staffing?
